# YourSkinCBR

> Specialist skin cancer clinic in Canberra, Australia. Dedicated skin cancer detection, diagnosis, and treatment with 5 specialist GPs across two locations in Crace and Denman Prospect.

## Website Information

- URL: https://yourskincbr.com.au
- Practice: YourSkinCBR
- Phone: (02) 6109 0000
- Booking System: HotDoc (online appointment booking)
- ABN: 12 345 678 901

## Locations

### YourSkinCBR@Crace
- Address: Unit 1, 5 Baratta Street, Crace ACT 2911
- Hours: Monday–Friday 8am–5:30pm, Saturday 8:30am–1pm

### YourSkinCBR@Denman Prospect
- Address: Level 1, 1B Felstead Vista, Denman Prospect ACT 2611
- Hours: Monday–Friday 8am–5:30pm, Saturday 8:30am–1pm

## Doctors

### Dr Chi So
- Qualifications: BMed MPH MMed
- Role: Skin Cancer Specialist GP
- Location: Denman Prospect

### Dr Rachel Liang
- Role: Skin Cancer Specialist GP
- Experience: Over a decade in skin cancer specialty
- Location: Denman Prospect

### Dr Reiham Ibrahim
- Experience: 25+ years GP experience
- Specialty: FotoFinder total body imaging technology expert
- Location: Crace

### Dr Kit Wong
- Qualifications: Masters in Skin Cancer Medicine, RACGP Fellow
- Location: Crace

### Dr Ian Chan
- Qualifications: Masters in Skin Cancer Medicine
- Location: Denman Prospect

## Pages

### Home
- Path: /
- Description: Landing page with practice overview, "Why Choose YourSkinCBR" feature cards, patient testimonials carousel (12 testimonials), location comparison with fee tables, "What to Expect" 6-step timeline (Book, Check, Biopsy, Results, Treatment, Aftercare), FAQ/fees accordion, and contact section with maps.

### Services
- Path: /services
- Description: 6 specialist services — Full Body Skin Checks (30–45 min), Dermoscopy (15–30 min), Skin Cancer Excision (30–60 min), Skin Biopsies (15–20 min), Skin Cancer Surveillance (20–30 min), Minor Procedures/Mole Removal (15–45 min). Each service includes description, features checklist, and duration.

### Case Studies
- Path: /case-studies
- Description: Clinical case studies with before/after images. Published cases include Basal Cell Carcinoma on ear (surgical excision, clear margins) and Suspicious Lesion detected via dermoscopy (biopsy and excision). More case studies planned.

### Doctors
- Path: /doctors
- Description: Directory of 5 specialist skin cancer GPs with profile cards showing qualifications, brief bios, and links to full profiles.

### Dr Chi So Profile
- Path: /doctors/dr-chi-so
- Description: Full profile with biography, qualifications, specialties, location, booking links, services offered, and patient testimonials.

### Dr Ian Chan Profile
- Path: /doctors/dr-ian-chan
- Description: Full profile with biography, qualifications, location, and booking links.

### Dr Kit Wong Profile
- Path: /doctors/dr-kit-wong
- Description: Full profile with biography, qualifications (Masters in Skin Cancer Medicine), location, and booking links.

### Dr Rachel Liang Profile
- Path: /doctors/dr-rachel-liang
- Description: Full profile with biography, decade of skin cancer experience, location, and booking links.

### Dr Reiham Ibrahim Profile
- Path: /doctors/dr-reiham-ibrahim
- Description: Full profile with biography, 25+ years experience, FotoFinder technology expertise, location, and booking links.

### Book at Crace
- Path: /book-crace
- Description: Booking page redirecting to HotDoc for YourSkinCBR@Crace appointments. Doctor availability information.

### Book at Denman
- Path: /book-denman
- Description: Booking page redirecting to HotDoc for YourSkinCBR@Denman appointments. Doctor availability information.

### Privacy Policy
- Path: /privacy-policy
- Description: Full YourGP privacy policy. PDF version available for download.

## Key Facts

- Specialty: Dedicated skin cancer detection, diagnosis, and treatment
- Techniques: Dermoscopy, FotoFinder total body imaging, surgical excision, biopsy
- Team: 5 specialist skin cancer GPs
- Saturday Clinic: Available at both locations 8:30am–1pm
- Process: Book → Skin Check → Biopsy (if needed) → Results → Treatment → Aftercare
- Services: Full body skin checks, dermoscopy, skin cancer excision, biopsies, surveillance, mole removal
